questions.question: A company has 8 hours to deliver a package. They have two vehicles, each taking 4 hours to make the delivery. If they start both vehicles at the same time, what will be the time taken to complete the delivery?
questions.hint: Consider the concept of time and resource utilization.

questions.question: An optimization technique is applied to minimize the total distance traveled by a truck over a period of 8 hours. The truck travels at an average speed of 60 km/h. What is the maximum distance the truck can travel in 8 hours?
questions.hint: Use the formula distance = speed × time to solve the problem.

questions.question: A production line has 8 hours to produce a certain number of units. The production rate is 200 units per hour. If the production line operates at a constant rate, how many units can be produced in 8 hours?
questions.hint: Use the concept of production rate and time to calculate the total units produced.
